title: Fable 5 Replacement Just Dropped: Fusion (Fable Level AI)
summary: OpenRouter released Fusion, a system that sends prompts to multiple AI models, compares responses, identifies blind spots, and synthesizes them into a unified stronger output. A budget Fusion configuration achieved results near Fable 5 on deep research benchmarks at approximately half the cost.
writeup: The video covers Fusion, a system from OpenRouter that routes a prompt to multiple AI models, compares their responses, identifies blind spots, and synthesizes them into a single unified output. The angle is positioning Fusion as a lower-cost alternative to Fable 5: a budget configuration reportedly reached results near Fable 5 on deep research benchmarks at roughly half the cost. The takeaway is that ensemble routing across models can approach top-tier deep research performance while cutting spending.
